elements.description: Duplex receptacle outlet symbols, each labeled '+1.20M' mounting height -- counted approximately 7 across the plan: 1 in นอน 1 (top wall), 2 close together at the top of นอน 2, 1 in ซักล้าง, 1 near the เตรียมอาหาร/พักผ่อน boundary, 1 on the west wall of จอดรถ, 1 in พักผ่อน near the LP panel
WH junction box (circled 'WH') near the จอดรถ/เตรียมอาหาร boundary, adjacent to an outlet symbol (⊖) and a '3/LP' circuit tag, fed by 2-4/G2.5 IEC 01-Ø15mm. wiring from the LP panel
แผงเมนสวิตช์ (LP), +1.80M, at the จอดรถ/พักผ่อน boundary wall (same location as shown on EE-03), feeding circuit '2/LP' onward toward เฉลียง via 2-2.5 NYY-Ø25mm.PVC

Incoming service run: หลักดิน (ground rod, ขนาด Ø14.2mm. ยาว 2.40m.), 1-10 IEC 01-20mm.PVC ground conductor running to the LP panel area, 2-10 IEC 01 Ø25mm.uPVC exterior exposed run (นอกอาคารเดินลอย) from a weatherproof bell switch (SB, +1.50M) near the bottom-left exterior wall/carport onward to an arrow labeled 'TO kWH METER' at the bottom of the sheet

sibling_files: บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า36_ac_notes.json
warnings: GRID CONFIRMATION (independent, matches t2's revised read, disagrees with t1): the printed dimension chain on this page (1.30+4.00+3.00+1.30 horizontal under grid 1/2/3; 1.50+4.00+bracket(2.00+3.50)+1.50+1.50 vertical below grid A) is identical to หน้า29/35 and matches the building grid master (หน้า00_gridline.json) exactly, including the A'/A'' dummy-grid extension position (unlabeled on this sheet itself, same caveat as หน้า29/35). My own independent read confirms t2's grid_source-linked treatment over t1's free-text call.

Exact count and room-by-room placement of duplex outlets is only partially legible (several '+1.20M' labels are clustered close together, especially the pair at the top of นอน 2); the count of 7 is best-effort, not a verified quantity -- flagged for zoom-review before using as a bill-of-quantities input.
This page also contains AC-circuit and telephone/antenna wiring notes, captured in the sibling file.

The service-entrance run (ground rod, kWh meter feed) is more fully legible on this sheet than on EE-02's single-line diagram -- both are consistent with each other (same conductor sizes, same ground-rod spec).
